subcodes.first_line: Let none make accusations against those who dwell therein. O people! Abandon vain imaginings, that they who are possessed of certitude may behold it. Whoso contendeth against him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لیس ان یتعرض احد علی من فی هناک یا قوم دعوا الموهوم لیروه اهل الیقین من یتعرض علیه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @personal instructions, @murder; causing physical harm
